query:
SELECT 
  DATE(FROM_UNIXTIME(usedAt/1000)) as date,
  COUNT(*) as credits_used,
  SUM(CASE WHEN result = 'found' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as found,
  SUM(CASE WHEN result = 'not_found' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as not_found
FROM apolloCreditLog
WHERE usedAt >= UNIX_TIMESTAMP(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)) * 1000
GROUP BY DATE(FROM_UNIXTIME(usedAt/1000))
ORDER BY date DESC;
